name: Lecta
description: Half taser, half whip. The Corpus Lecta delivers a deadly shock to anything it touches.

patchlogs.name: Saint of Altra: Update 25.7.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Meteor Whip Skin only listing the Lecta as a compatible whip.

patchlogs.name: The Jovian Concord: Hotfix 25.0.8
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Lecta Energy color persisting as default.

patchlogs.name: Chains of Harrow: Hotfix 21.0.4
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed an issue where already dead bodies would yield Credits if hit with the Secura Lecta.

patchlogs.name: The Glast Gambit: Update 19.8.0
patchlogs.changes: The Credit Boost function for the Secura Lecta has changed. Before, you could get on average 11.6x Credits from kills. This chance has changed and now scales with Mastery Rank. At Mastery Rank 8, you'll get on average 2x Credits from kills. This increase continues with your Mastery Rank. At Mastery Rank 18 you'll get on average 4x Credits from kills (capped). No other changes were made regarding synergies (i.e Chroma's Effigy, etc)

patchlogs.name: The Silver Grove: U2
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Lecta not displaying it’s proper FX.

patchlogs.name: Warframe: Sanctuary
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the weapon trail placement on the Lecta.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 11.0.4
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed missing animations on knee slide with Lecta spin.Fixed 10 foot tall heavies in Phobos.
